title: Google Antigravity CLI Full Walkthrough
summary: Google Antigravity is an agentic development platform that extends IDE functionality into the agent-first era. It enables developers to operate at a task-oriented level by managing agents across workspaces while retaining a familiar AI IDE experience. Agents autonomously plan and execute complex end-to-end tasks across editor, terminal, and browser.
